ford_puma_job_note_119976b459.text: Silca explicitly lists the Ford Puma from 2019 with HU101, 433 MHz and ID47. Use this keyed record only where mechanical ignition is physically confirmed.

ford_puma_job_note_965100c1c0.text: The original Puma is Fiesta-derived and spans a legacy Ford PATS transition. Blade and European remote frequency are useful for stock lookup, but the chip must be confirmed by exact year/build or original key before programming.

ford_puma_job_note_22c0726564.text: Use where push-button start is confirmed. The Silca 2019 Puma application independently confirms HU101, 433 MHz and ID47 for the modern generation.

verification.notes: Duplicate wording is collapsed in this index. Each note remains traceable to the verified generation-specific records in models.json.
